customAttributes.description:
This version of this card has a non-standard Magic back. It is not legal for constructed play.
As Lich enters the battlefield, you lose life equal to your life total.
You don’t lose the game for having 0 or less life.
If you would gain life, draw that many cards instead.
Whenever you’re dealt damage, sacrifice that many nontoken permanents. If you can’t, you lose the game.
When Lich is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you lose the game.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/28/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
